intent: 2BR / 1 bath compact starter — LOWER bound of the 45-65 m² floor band, no carport. 10.5x11 lot gives a 6.5x7 envelope = 45.5 m² floor, sitting right at the lower edge of the single_bath_gr range. Single common bath shared between bedrooms (no ensuite). Open-plan great room + kitchen. Building footprint is a clean rectangle — no L-cut.
